evals.prompt: I'm building a tech blog and need some high-quality landscape photos of modern office workspaces for my hero sections. Also need a few short background videos. Find me some options.
evals.expected_output: Should use searchPhotos (Pexels) for photos with orientation=landscape, searchVideos for videos. May also suggest get_search_photos (Unsplash) as alternative. Should mention image sizes (src.large for hero) and licensing info.
